main.description: Singleton (rkey "self") marking when the viewer last opened their notifications panel. Notifications themselves are derived projections over public engagement records (app.gainforest.feed.like + app.gainforest.feed.post reply-posts on the viewer's records) — nothing is stored. This record holds only the per-viewer `seenAt` timestamp used to compute the unread count: a notification is unread when its createdAt is newer than `seenAt`. Lives in the viewer's own repo and is read directly from their PDS (it is not indexed).

seenAt.description: When the viewer last marked their notifications as seen.
